# Work Report (2026-04-23 to 2026-04-28)

*Autogenerated by TaskLedger*

## 🦀 Things I've been working on

- **[CNTRLPLANE-1349: Expand HyperShift e2e test suite](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-1349)**
  - Pushed commits to add availability zones and Premium SSD v2 for guest cluster etcd to improve Azure self-managed e2e reliability
  - Pushed fix to drop guest cluster availability zones to resolve test framework mismatch with Azure zone-based NodePools
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/release/pull/78133

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3043: Build jira-agent performance dashboard](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3043)**
  - Pushed text search filter and null-safe fixes to jira-agent dashboard
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8033

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3314: Unify registry override and image resolution code behind a single abstraction](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3314)**
  - Pushed commit to rename ReleaseProvider to ReleaseInfoProvider and absorb StaticProviderDecorator per @enxebre review feedback
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/enhancements/pull/1981

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3324: Enable gocyclo linter and reduce cyclomatic complexity in HyperShift](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3324)**
  - Opened draft PR to enable gocyclo linter and reduce cyclomatic complexity
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8309

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3330: Improve CI unit test speed with sharding, parallelism, and build caching](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3330)**
  - Opened PR to shard unit tests and add t.Parallel() for improved CI speed
  - Merged PR: ci: improve unit test speed with sharding and parallelism
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8330

- **[CNTRLPLANE-3340: Extract support/podspec package from support/util](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/CNTRLPLANE-3340)**
  - Pushed refactor to extract pod-spec helpers into new support/podspec package and updated ~120 callers
  - Ran e2e verification testing on podspec extraction PR
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8354

- **[OCPBUGS-84251: Self-managed Azure: stale role assignments cause 403 AuthorizationFailed on cluster re-creation](https://issues.redhat.com/browse/OCPBUGS-84251)**
  - Opened draft PR to detect and replace stale Azure role assignments on cluster re-creation
  - Removed hold and marked PR ready for review
  - PR(s): https://github.com/openshift/hypershift/pull/8322
